task_completion.description: Agent opens and reviews the AUDIT_REPORT.md file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot showing AUDIT_REPORT.md open in a text editor or IDE, or its contents displayed in the terminal.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the exception swallowing in RecordParser.java.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of RecordParser.java in an editor showing that NumberFormatException is no longer caught and swallowed (returning 0L), but instead allowed to propagate.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the broad exception catching in EventLogger.java.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of EventLogger.java in an editor showing the removal or narrowing of the broad `catch(Exception)` block so that NullPointerException is not suppressed.
Screenshot of ConfigLoader.java in an editor showing a try-with-resources block (e.g., `try (Reader r = ...)`) being used to handle IO resources.

task_completion.description: Agent fixes the silent dropping of corrupt records in BatchProcessor.java.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of BatchProcessor.java in an editor showing the removal of the broad exception catch that silently ignores errors for corrupt records.

task_completion.description: Agent runs the test suite and all 9 tests pass.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot of a terminal running `mvn test` or an IDE test runner showing that all 9 tests in ExceptionHandlingTest have passed successfully (e.g., 'Tests run: 9, Failures: 0, Errors: 0').

integrity.description: Ensure ExceptionHandlingTest.java was not modified to force tests to pass.
integrity.visual_evidence: The test file ExceptionHandlingTest.java should not appear in git diffs, modified file lists, or show edits in the editor that alter the assertions or remove tests.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually edited the Java files rather than just printing a fake test success message.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show the code editor with the actual changes applied to the four target Java files.

integrity.description: Ensure the test results come from a real test runner.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should show standard Maven output logs (e.g., [INFO] tags, Surefire plugin output) or the IDE should show the graphical test runner interface with green checkmarks, not a simple echo command.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The project is located at /home/ga/IdeaProjects/legacy-service. There are 4 specific bugs to fix: 1) RecordParser swallows NumberFormatException (returns 0L). 2) EventLogger has a broad catch(Exception) suppressing NullPointerException. 3) ConfigLoader catches IOException without try-with-resources. 4) BatchProcessor silently drops corrupt records via broad exception catching. The test suite com.legacy.ExceptionHandlingTest contains exactly 9 tests. ExceptionHandlingTest.java must NOT be modified.
